8))\n","\n","retail.groupby('Category')['Revenue'].sum().plot(kind='bar', ax=axes[0,0], color='#1565C0')\n","axes[0,0].set_title('Total Revenue by Category')\n","axes[0,0].set_xlabel('Category'); Sold')\n","axes[0,1].set_xlabel('Quantity Sold'); axes[0,1].set_ylabel('Frequency')\n","\n","axes[1,0].scatter(retail['Price'], retail['Revenue'], color='#AD1457')\n","axes[1,0].set_title('Price vs Revenue')\n","axes[1,0].set_xlabel('Price'); axes[1,0].set_ylabel('Revenue')\n","\n","retail.boxplot(column='Revenue', by='Category', ax=axes[1,1], rot=30)\n","axes[1,1].set_title('Revenue Spread by Category')\n","plt.suptitle('')\n","plt.tight_layout()\n","plt.show()"],"id":"48OJ6xFPPUV9"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"mnOrjG9vPUV-"},"source":["**Observations:** Fruits generate the 8))\n","\n","agri.groupby('Soil_Type')['Crop_Yield_kg'].mean().plot(kind='bar', ax=axes[0,0], color='#33691E')\n","axes[0,0].set_title('Average Crop Yield by Soil Type')\n","axes[0,0].set_xlabel('Soil Type'); axes[0,0].set_ylabel('Avg Crop Yield (kg)')\n","\n","axes[0,1].hist(agri['Rainfall_mm'], bins=6, color='#0277BD', edgecolor='black')\n","axes[0,1].set_title('Distribution of Rainfall')\n","axes[0,1].set_xlabel('Rainfall (mm)'); axes[0,1].set_ylabel('Frequency')\n","\n","axes[1,0].scatter(agri['Fertilizer_kg'], agri['Crop_Yield_kg'], color='#EF6C00')\n","axes[1,0].set_title('Fertilizer Usage vs Crop Yield')\n","axes[1,0].set_xlabel('Fertilizer (kg)'); axes[1,0].set_ylabel('Crop Yield (kg)')\n","\n","agri.boxplot(column='Crop_Yield_kg', by='Soil_Type', ax=axes[1,1])\n","axes[1,1].set_title('Crop Yield Spread by Soil Type')\n","plt.suptitle('')\n","plt.tight_layout()\n","plt.show()"],"id":"sN6dU40TPUWA"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"4VyLQZAvPUWA"},"source":["**Observations:** Loamy soil gives the highest yield; more rainfall & fertilizer → higher yield; Sandy soil gives the lowest yield; no missing/duplicate data.\n","\n","**Conclusion:** Soil type and rainfall are the biggest drivers of crop
